ogTitle: Paraparap vs Park Orchards: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paraparap and Park Orchards.
heading: Paraparap vs Park Orchards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paraparap, Victoria and Park Orchards, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Park Orchards has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Paraparap (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paraparap or Park Orchards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paraparap has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Park Orchards scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paraparap scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Park Orchards scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paraparap or Park Orchards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Park Orchards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
